executive_summary: The parallax CLI implementation fully satisfies all 8 user stories and all 9 functional requirements of the PRD. All 37 automated tests pass (0 failures), TypeScript typecheck is clean, and the shebang + bin field are correctly configured.
minor_observations: FR-9 optional video/audio SDK placeholder interfaces not added — acceptable per 'may be added' PRD language.
configureOutput error reformatter uses regex against commander internals; brittle if commander changes error format in a future major. commander ^12.0.0 pin mitigates risk.
US-008 AC01/AC02 (bun link + global invocation) are configuration-verified but not covered by automated tests.
conclusions_and_recommendations: No remediation required. Recommended follow-ups: (1) pin commander to 12.x; (2) add video/audio SDK placeholder types in @parallax/sdk; (3) document or automate bun-link smoke test for US-008.

refactor_plan.notes: Change '^12.0.0' to '12.x' to protect regex-based error reformatter from upstream breaking changes.
Add GenerateVideoRequest, GenerateAudioRequest, and corresponding response interfaces.
Manual verification steps for US-008 AC01/AC02 or add to CI.
